2235520.name: GalaxyVerse
2235520.description:
GalaxyVerse is an MMORPG developed in the first quarter of 2021. The main aim of the game is not PvP. The main purpose is to create your own avatar and spend time with your friends in the GalaxyVerse universe, which is a digital world. So what awaits us at GalaxyVerse?

Customizable Avatar: A person can choose an avatar that looks like himself.

MutantForest: You can go to this designated map to progress through the mini-story of the game, destroy creatures with your friends and collect items and in-game currency that will strengthen your avatar.

Market System: You can buy/sell items from the ready-made markets in the game. You can sell your item to other players by creating a market in a designated area.

Construction System: You can make your own structures in this city as an example (house, farm, portal) by purchasing plots of land on the Origin map.

Craft System: In GalaxyVerse, you can produce by making use of diversity. By collecting resources (wood, stone, flower, leather) in certain regions, you can produce new items in places such as blacksmith or lumberjack. (Your own armor, the structure to be placed on your land) these products can be sold and traded in the market.

Touristic and fun areas: In GalaxyVerse, you can socialize with other people and participate in activities in the Nightclub, and visit special tourism areas. (Soon to be VR Integrated.)

Pet System: There is a pet system that will be your friend.

Clan/Group System: You can set up your own Clan. By sending a group invitation, you can work with other people and gain an advantage in collecting items.

Special City System: If you have a land in Origin, you can add a portal to your land, go to your city that is special to you and organize your own city depending on your imagination and invite your friends to this city.

Quest System: The system where you can earn certain rewards by taking quests from the NPCs found to progress through the game story.

Mount System: You can use various mounts available in the markets such as (Horse, Flying Dragon) in order to navigate the GalaxyVerse comfortably and quickly.

Skill System: The system in GalaxyVerse for those who want to progress on the RPG Gaming side. In this system, you can use special skills in the game by choosing the skills (Burner, Remote) that you can choose when creating your avatar.
2235520.supported_languages:
土耳其语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
